title: myosotis hispida var. lebelii
intro: Myosotis hispida var. lebelii, also known as Lebel's forget-me-not or Lebel's mouse-ear, is a flowering plant species within the family Boraginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Myosotis hispida var. lebelii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
